# Ahinsa Green Valley Empire — Image Slot

**Project URL:** `/projects/green-valley-empire`
**Location:** Agra, UP
**Type:** Premium Residential Apartments

Drop the following files in this folder. Once added, update the URLs in
`src/data/site.js` &rarr; `PROJECT_DETAILS.green-valley-empire`.

## Required Images

- `hero.jpg`
- `card.jpg`
- `overview.jpg`
- `gallery-1.jpg` &mdash; `gallery-6.jpg`

## Optional Images

- `master-plan.jpg`
- `floorplan-1.jpg`, `floorplan-2.jpg`
- `location-map.jpg`
- `logo.png`

See `../README.md` for sizes and conventions.
